config.horn-lasers.name: Horn lasers
config.horn-lasers.tooltip: Enable/disable the Deathicorn's horn laser auto-attack.
config.laser-interval.name: Laser interval (seconds)
config.laser-range.name: Laser range (tiles)
config.laser-range.tooltip: How far the horn lasers can target enemies.
config.deathicorn-glow.name: Deathicorn glow
config.deathicorn-glow.tooltip: Emit light like a glow ring (mounted or nearby when dismounted).
config.bolt-core-color.name: Bolt core color
config.bolt-core-color.tooltip: Color of the traveling bolt core at the tip of the beam.
config.bolt-glow-color.name: Bolt glow color
config.bolt-glow-color.tooltip: Color of the glow around the traveling bolt core.
config.impact-splash-color.name: Impact splash color
config.impact-splash-color.tooltip: Color of the splash/flash when the bolt hits an enemy.
config.glow-color.name: Glow color
config.glow-color.tooltip: Color of the Deathicorn's light (Prismatic cycles).
config.glow-radius.name: Glow radius
config.glow-radius.tooltip: Light radius in tiles. (Glow Ring is ~10; Small Glow Ring is ~5.)
